notes: Lane ownership: StatiBaker dashboard/query/docs surfaces for read-only display of local runsheet/progress artifacts. Do not change the autonomous-orchestrator runner unless a blocking dashboard issue is found. Do not make Kanboard canonical. Prefer read-only projection using local JSON and existing SQLite/query patterns. Preferred model: gpt-5.1-codex-max for coupled dashboard changes; gpt-5.1-codex-mini for narrow docs/tests.
